message:
feat(fsfs,lexical): add semantic VOI gate, cass-compatible Tantivy index, and TUI render/timing overhaul

Search pipeline — semantic value-of-information (VOI) gate:
- Introduce SemanticVoiDecision struct with Bayesian expected-loss model
  that decides at runtime whether to invoke the semantic embedding stage.
  Prior odds are derived from QueryIntentClass (NaturalLanguage, ShortKeyword,
  Identifier, etc.), then adjusted by token count, query length, lexical head
  score gap, mean top-k score, and output limit.  The decision compares
  expected latency loss vs. expected miss loss per execution mode.
- Wire the VOI gate into execute_search_phase_artifacts so the semantic stage
  is skipped when the model predicts net negative value, with structured
  tracing emitting posterior/loss metrics per query.
- Add FSFS_SEMANTIC_VOI_FORCE_RUN env var escape hatch.

Search pipeline — lexical fast path and snippet deferral:
- Add search_doc_ids() to TantivyIndex — a lightweight synchronous method
  that returns only (doc_id, bm25_score, rank) without metadata JSON decode,
  for latency-critical hot paths.
- Add LexicalIdHit struct to frankensearch-lexical.
- Thread include_snippets and persist_explain_session bool flags through
  execute_search_payloads and execute_search_phase_artifacts, allowing
  callers to skip snippet hydration and explain-session persistence when
  they only need ranked doc IDs.
- During interactive TUI search-as-you-type, single-token queries now stay
  in a lexical-only lane (tui_prefers_lexical_only_query), with snippet
  hydration deferred to the quality idle gate, keeping keystroke latency
  sub-30ms.
- Add lexical_stage_result_limit() that returns a tight SNIPPET_HEAD_LIMIT
  while the user is actively typing and the full limit once the semantic
  idle gate has elapsed.

Merge deduplication optimization:
- merge_with_lexical_tail now only tracks seen IDs from the fused head
  (seen_head_ids HashSet) instead of growing a full set across the entire
  lexical tail, reducing allocation on large corpora.  Lexical candidates
  are expected unique under normal upsert/index invariants.

TUI render throttling and timing:
- Add FSFS_TUI_SEARCH_RENDER_MIN_INTERVAL_MS (16ms) and
  FSFS_TUI_SEARCH_RENDER_IDLE_HEARTBEAT_MS (180ms) constants.
  The render loop now tracks render_pending / last_render and only
  redraws when interaction_changed + min-interval has elapsed, or
  on an idle heartbeat.  This eliminates redundant repaints on every
  poll cycle.
- Raise FSFS_TUI_STATUS_REFRESH_MS from 900ms to 15s and add
  FSFS_TUI_STATUS_REFRESH_ACTIVE_GRACE_MS (2.5s) to suppress status
  refreshes while the user is actively typing.  Status refresh errors
  are now warn-logged and the previous snapshot is preserved instead of
  propagating the error.

Adaptive idle gate improvements:
- Replace fixed 2x multiplier for semantic gate with exponential
  inter-keystroke quantile model: pause_quantile_gate_ms() multiplies
  typing cadence by -ln(1 - quantile) expressed as per-mille constants
  (semantic 97.0th percentile ~3.507x, quality 99.5th ~5.299x).
- Widen idle gate ranges: semantic 120..420ms, quality 260..1200ms.
- Quality gate is now independently computed from cadence (not just
  2x semantic + 40ms) with a floor of semantic_gate + 40.

Output buffering:
- CLI search emit_envelope path now wraps stdout in BufWriter with 1MB
  capacity and explicit flush, reducing syscall overhead for large result
  sets in JSONL/CSV mode.

Short-query tuning:
- Raise FSFS_SEARCH_SHORT_QUERY_CHAR_THRESHOLD from 2 to 5.
- Lower FSFS_SEARCH_SHORT_QUERY_BUDGET_MULTIPLIER from 2 to 1.

Cass-compatible lexical index (new module):
- Add crates/frankensearch-lexical/src/cass_compat.rs implementing a
  full Tantivy index lifecycle compatible with the cass schema (v6):
  14-field schema (agent, workspace, source_path, msg_idx, created_at,
  title, content, title_prefix, content_prefix, preview, source_id,
  origin_kind, origin_host, workspace_original) with hyphen_normalize
  tokenizer and edge-ngram prefix fields.
- CassTantivyIndex with open_or_create (schema-hash gated rebuild),
  add_cass_documents batch ingestion, commit, delete_all, segment_count,
  merge_status with global AtomicI64 cooldown tracking, optimize_if_idle
  (threshold + cooldown gate), and force_merge.
- Helper functions: cass_build_schema, cass_fields_from_schema,
  cass_index_dir, cass_ensure_tokenizer, cass_generate_edge_ngrams,
  cass_build_preview, cass_schema_hash_matches.
- Re-export all public items from frankensearch-lexical lib.rs.

Tests:
- search_dashboard_lexical_stage_result_limit_is_tight_while_typing
- search_dashboard_lexical_stage_result_limit_returns_full_after_idle
- search_dashboard_idle_gate_scales_with_typing_cadence
- tui_prefers_lexical_only_for_single_token_queries
- semantic_voi_skips_short_keyword_when_lexical_signal_is_strong
- semantic_voi_runs_for_natural_language_when_lexical_signal_is_weak
- merge_with_lexical_tail_preserves_head_order_and_appends_tail
- merge_with_lexical_tail_applies_filter_to_head_and_tail
- search_doc_ids_returns_ranked_identifiers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
